text:
Pushed a couple updates to make things smarter and smoother. First up: Gemini models now have a reasoning flag for images. Basically, it thinks a bit harder before it generates your pixels. 

Second: fixed the usage exports for the power users. If you're running massive batches, your data logs will actually export neatly now without throwing a fit.

Code is open, as always. Keep building. 🐝🌱

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #developerlife #generativeai #retroaesthetic
